title: Architecture Decision Record: Database
content: We selected Postgres as the primary database for Atlas. Key reasons: ACID compliance, mature ecosystem, Alice's prior experience with it at scale. MongoDB was ruled out due to eventual consistency concerns.
author: alice

title: Q1 Engineering Decisions
content: Three decisions made this quarter: (1) Postgres for Atlas, (2) Kafka for Phoenix event pipeline replacing RabbitMQ, (3) TypeScript standardisation across all frontend projects led by Carol.
author: carol

title: Orion Project Brief
content: Orion is the next-gen data pipeline project owned by Grace. It will use Python, Apache Airflow for orchestration, and write to Postgres. Bob is handling the Kubernetes deployment.
author: grace
